author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Rewrote binary_map to use stride-based N-D counter (odometer pattern) instead of per-element modulo/division index decomposition. Inner dimension iterated as a tight loop with precomputed strides. O(1) amortized counter increment vs O(ndim) modulo+division per element. Also added contiguous() materialization for non-contiguous input views. All 837 core + 6 integration tests pass.
